news:news.news:title: Tensions escalate in the Middle East with Israel's unilateral actions and Iran's retaliatory strikes, while civil unrest continues in various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East tensions, Iran-Israel conflict, civil rights controversies

news:news.news:title: Oil and gas prices surged following attacks on facilities in the Middle East, while the US Federal Reserve plans to soften capital rules for major banks.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East oil and gas crisis, US Federal Reserve capital requirements, China robotics industry developments, Florida real estate market trends

news:news.news:title: Sony's new WF-1000XM6 earbuds are discounted, while Meta faces scrutiny over a rogue AI incident affecting data access.
news:news.news:keywords: discounts on tech products, Meta AI security incident, EV industry challenges, Android sideloading changes, prediction markets in journalism

news:news.news:title: Duke narrowly escaped an upset in the NCAA tournament while Nebraska celebrated its first-ever tournament victory, and NFL owners prepare to vote on a succession plan for the Raiders.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA tournament updates, NFL succession plan news, World Baseball Classic viewership trends

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new subatomic particle, insights into dinosaur nesting behaviors, and the mapping of cancer genetics in cats and humans.
news:news.news:keywords: new discoveries in particle physics, dinosaur nesting behavior research, cancer genetics in cats and humans, advancements in superconductors, exoplanet characteristics

news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran has escalated tensions, with significant military actions and political implications affecting global markets and regional stability.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran conflict updates, global oil prices rise, Ecuador gang violence, US interest rates and inflation, international accidents and safety

news:news.news:title: The Federal Reserve maintains interest rates amid inflation concerns driven by the Iran war, while Trump seeks to lower oil prices through regulatory changes.
news:news.news:keywords: Federal Reserve interest rates, Trump oil price regulations, Starbucks union negotiations, CBS News workers walkout, windfall tax on oil companies

news:news.news:title: The FBI's acquisition of location data without warrants raises privacy concerns, while Amazon defends its USPS contract amid financial struggles.
news:news.news:keywords: FBI location data privacy concerns, Amazon USPS contract issues, Section 230 reform discussions, Robinhood social media platform, latest tech product deals

news:news.news:title: Miami (Ohio) and Prairie View A&M secured historic NCAA tournament victories, while the NFL considers a significant rule change for draft pick trades.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA tournament updates, NFL draft pick trade proposals, Rory McIlroy Masters dinner menu

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a hidden granite mass in Antarctica, insights into feathered dinosaurs, and a new exoplanet with unusual sulfur-rich gases.
news:news.news:keywords: hidden granite mass in Antarctica, feathered dinosaurs flight capabilities, unique exoplanet sulfur-rich gases, advancements in quantum physics, social behavior in bull sharks

news:news.news:title: Iran-Sudan Conflicts Ignite Global Tensions as Bank of England Prepares Rate Hikes
Iran Conflict Fuels Global Market Turmoil as Fed Holds Rates Amid Inflation Fears
